release_notes: iPos Sync Agent v0.6.2 makes Target Sync fully independent per (product, sync target), adds temporary Meta Catalog exclusion ("rem sementara") so toggling Target Sync off skips a product from Meta sync entirely, makes Meta Catalog live sync crash-resilient (logs partial progress instead of losing it) and adds automatic re-lookup for WooCommerce products whose cached ID went stale, switches Meta Product Set membership to a dynamic category filter (custom_label_0) instead of a static retailer_id snapshot, adds an in-app category/sub-category editor popup for Meta Catalog (Product Manager, dark/light), and adds a Status/Marketplace filter plus a background-thread fix for the Logs tab that eliminates the UI freeze when switching filters on large log tables. No changes to WooCommerce sync logic, pricing, or the Batch API/STOP SYNC/index fixes from v0.6.1.
